formulas.example: The Hunt for America's Smartest Killer
How an FBI Agent Infiltrated the KKK

formulas.pattern: The {unlikely people} Who {did the audacious thing}
formulas.example: The Kids Who Hacked The CIA

formulas.pattern: flat declarative judgment or genuine question
formulas.example: What Was on Bin Laden's Hard Drive?

rules: name the subject, never withhold it; scale words carry curiosity
one superlative OR one institution per title, never stacked
Title Case, no listicle numbers, question marks only for real mysteries
the video must pay off the scale word
examples: The Hunt for the King of the Dark Web
The Kids Who Hacked The CIA
How a Pilot Hijacked a Plane
The Genius Design of Narco Submarines
